compiled_state.title: Sprint: epic completion -> /dso:end not invoked after session
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
**Expected Behavior:** After sprint completes an epic (all stories closed, epic validated and closed, merged to main), the orchestrator invokes /dso:end to perform session close steps: technical learnings, session summary, and worktree cleanup.

**Actual Behavior:** Sprint exits Phase 8 (Session Close) without running /dso:end. Technical learnings, session summary, and worktree cleanup are skipped silently.

**Reproduction:** Run /dso:sprint on an epic through full completion (all stories → epic closure → merge-to-main). Observe that the session ends without /dso:end steps.

**Observed:** After baff-7163 (DSO NextJS Starter) completed — sprint exited directly without end-session steps.

**Escalation Policy:** Escalate when blocked
